title: Paul Tudor Jones Just Bought 57% More IREN Shares, Betting Big On The 'AI Infrastructure Buildout' As It 'Feels Like '99'
description: Legendary hedge fund manager Paul Tudor Jones has massively increased his stake in data center and infrastructure company IREN Ltd. (NASDAQ:IREN), expanding his position by 57% to capitalize on the explosive artificial intelligence (AI) boom. A Strategic Pivot To Equity According to Tudor Investment Corp's latest first quarter 2026 13F filing, Jones purchased an additional 11.58 million common shares of IREN, bringing his total holdings to a staggering 31.8 million shares. title: IREN Joins Russell 3000 As AI And Crypto Pivot Gains Attention
description: IREN Limited has been added to the Russell 3000 Index, bringing it into a widely followed U.S. equity benchmark. The inclusion recognizes IREN's pivot toward AI and cloud infrastructure alongside its existing crypto operations. The change is linked to index rebalancing that affects which companies are tracked by index funds and ETFs.
